crime.value: Double murder by stabbing; parents killed in their bedroom; question: will the daughter be caught?
crime.quote: They were stabbed through the heart. Four times each, they bled out pretty quick.

victim.value: Parents who apparently abused their daughter, making them targets for her revenge
victim.quote: I think about all the terrible things that happened to me in there.

closed_world.value: Family home where the crime occurred, with limited suspects due to missing daughter
closed_world.quote: no one's heard or seen the daughter since yesterday.

culprit_and_motive.value: The daughter killed her parents to escape abuse and gain freedom
culprit_and_motive.quote: For the first time in my life, I look at them unafraid. My lips twist into a smile. I'm free.

investigator.value: Detective Tom Barton, official police investigator assigned to the case
investigator.quote: Detective Tom Barton walked into the precinct coffee in hand.

suspect_architecture.value: Single primary suspect: daughter with clear means (knife), motive (abusive parents), and opportunity (living in house)
suspect_architecture.quote: no one's heard or seen the daughter since yesterday

clue_fairness.value: Murder weapon location, time of death window, and missing daughter status all presented to reader when discovered
clue_fairness.quote: A CSI found the murder weapon in the bathroom sink

social_world.value: Dysfunctional family structure with apparent history of abuse creating power imbalance between parents and daughter
social_world.quote: I think about all the terrible things that happened to me in there

investigator_wound.value: Detective Barton experiences unease and psychological discomfort from the dark atmosphere of the case
investigator_wound.quote: Something about this case gave him an uneasy feeling

_meta.title: ebook ayrin southworth catch me if you can
